scripts.build: pnpm --filter @promo-code-manager/shared build && pnpm --filter @promo-code-manager/api build && pnpm --filter @promo-code-manager/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @promo-code-manager/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @promo-code-manager/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @promo-code-manager/web typecheck
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @promo-code-manager/shared lint && pnpm --filter @promo-code-manager/api lint && pnpm --filter @promo-code-manager/web lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @promo-code-manager/shared test && pnpm --filter @promo-code-manager/api test && pnpm --filter @promo-code-manager/web test
scripts.seed: docker compose run --rm api pnpm --filter @promo-code-manager/api seed
